chunks.text: Yesterday afternoon, the rain was falling outside.
My family were all in the house.
I was reading a book in my room.
The story was interesting, and I forgot the time.
In the next room, my sister was playing music.
Pochi was sleeping happily on a chair.
In the kitchen, my mother was cooking dinner.
My father was working in his study.
We were all doing different things
but we were having a quiet afternoon in the same house.
